array.string: env_file="${ADP_LOCAL_ENV_FILE:-$HOME/.config/arxiv-daily-push/local-runner.env}"; if [ -f "$env_file" ]; then set -a; . "$env_file"; set +a; fi; cert_file="/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/lib/python3.13/site-packages/certifi/cacert.pem"; if [ -f "$cert_file" ]; then export SSL_CERT_FILE="$cert_file"; fi; mkdir -p /Users/linzezhang/.adp/arxiv-daily-push/health; cd /Users/linzezhang/Documents/Codex/2026-06-19/current-phase-phase-0-goal-scope/work/CodexProject && PYTHONPATH=arxiv-daily-push/src python3 -m arxiv_daily_push local-runner preflight --project-root /Users/linzezhang/Documents/Codex/2026-06-19/current-phase-phase-0-goal-scope/work/CodexProject/arxiv-daily-push --state-dir /Users/linzezhang/.adp/arxiv-daily-push --generated-at "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")" --require-smtp --json > /Users/linzezhang/.adp/arxiv-daily-push/health/latest-preflight.json
